message:
test(oracle): add 4 conformance tests: text-number coercion, UNION types, nested aggregates, multi-row VALUES

Tests cover: text-to-number coercion edge cases in arithmetic (non-numeric
text, numeric prefix, float prefix, pure int/float text, scientific notation,
empty string, leading whitespace), UNION with mixed column types, nested
aggregate expressions (SUM inside CASE, aggregate arithmetic, COUNT(*) vs
COUNT(col)), multi-row VALUES insert.

Known gap: standalone VALUES in FROM clause not yet supported.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
